subject: update rancher version to 1.6.18

Patch Set 1:

1.6.18 is required for clustering fixes since 1.6.14 (no change to kubernetes, docker, helm) - except server-side helm is already at 2.8.2

Patch Set 1:

ubuntu@ip-172-31-1-119:~$ sudo logging-analytics/deploy/rancher/oom_rancher_setup.sh -b master -s master.onap.info -e onap
